channel.title: Lotus Lane Daily
channel.description: Daily wisdom drawn from centuries of philosophical writing, applied to the things that actually keep us up at night — burnout, anxiety, loneliness, loss, comparison. Short, honest, listenable. New episode every weekday.
channel.itunes:summary: Daily wisdom drawn from centuries of philosophical writing, applied to the things that actually keep us up at night — burnout, anxiety, loneliness, loss, comparison. Short, honest, listenable. New episode every weekday.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Wisdom for what you're going through
channel.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: When Anger Takes Over
item.description: You snap at the people you love. The rage doesn't make sense. Here's what ancient philosophy says about it.
item.itunes:summary: You snap at the people you love. The rage doesn't make sense. Here's what ancient philosophy says about it.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: Burned Out and Running on Empty
item.description: You've given everything and there's nothing left. What to do when hustle culture breaks you.
item.itunes:summary: You've given everything and there's nothing left. What to do when hustle culture breaks you.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane
